name: Movmax Blade Arm for Action Camera and Smartphone
description: Film dynamic vehicle-mounted shots with your compact action camera using the MOVMAX Blade Arm. This vibration reducing arm is designed to support your DJI Pocket 3 or similar compact camera thanks to its 5.3 to 17.6 oz load capacity.

features.Key Features:: 5.3 to 17.6 oz Load Capacity | Vibration Reducing Arm | Suction Cup | 1/4"-20 Screw, Counterweights
features.What's In the Box?: 1x MOVMAX Blade Arm for DJI Pocket 3 | 1x 1/4" Screw Connector | 2x Counterweight Block | 1x Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
